generatorNotes: Moved each inbox fact to a canonical doc and reduced notes.md to pointers. No Markdown or link checker is defined in package.json, so no doc check was run.
judgeNotes: All critical placement requirements are met. README provides the project purpose, a useful test command, and a canonical docs index; AGENTS.md stays concise and routes agents to schema, safety, troubleshooting, and residual-risk guidance. Durable facts from notes.md were moved into appropriate docs without inventing unsupported project details or creating an unnecessary skill.
